mapper.select:
SELECT * FROM Books
ORDER BY book_id DESC LIMIT #{limit} OFFSET #{offset}
SELECT * FROM Books WHERE book_id = #{bookId} AND sale_status = 'ON_SALE'
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO Books (title, author, publisher, isbn, price, stock, category, description, image_url, sale_status) VALUES (#{title}, #{author}, #{publisher}, #{isbn}, #{price}, #{stock}, #{category}, #{description}, #{imageUrl}, #{saleStatus})
